mods.name: Super Storm PL
mods.description: Gamers, who install the SuperStorm mod, take profit from new team options. These handle the alliances between human and AI-players automatically depending on the presetting. Moreover, the mod presents changes in the resource - and weather-options. After installing, resources last 4 to 16 times longer and the weather can be influenced. But that's not all. SuperStorm provides a clear view on the explored map after removing the fog of war with a mouse click. The "Observer"-Option, only available in the single player game, allows you to watch AI-players battling it out and ignore you totally.
